fallback: Used book2skill plus skill-creator-style distillation because this runtime has no local cangjie skill available.
runtimeDependencyPolicy: Closed skill: execute from SKILL.md; use references/source-notes.md only as local optional provenance; do not require external source folders, webpages, original books, source reports, machine-local paths, or cross-skill files.

closureReview.scope: Closed-loop review of SKILL.md, test-prompts.json, and audit.json.
closureReview.notes: Added non-trigger guidance, standalone contract, activation gate, output format, recovery/idempotency protocol, hard rules, and compliance expectations.
